name: Clown Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place 2-1/2 inch paper liners in a 24 muffin cup pan.
3. Prepare, bake, and cool the cupcakes following package directions.
4. To assemble each clown, remove the paper liner from the cooled cupcake.
5. Place the top-side down on a serving plate.
6. Top with a scoop of ice cream.
7. Place the cone on the ice cream for the hat.
8. Drizzle whipped cream around the bottom of the cupcake for the collar.
9. Add three small dots up front of the cone for eyes.
10. Sprinkle colored sprinkles over the whipped cream.
11. Use candies to create a clown face.
Note: This recipe makes 24 cupcakes, 12 of which can be made into clowns and 12 can be frozen for later use. Cupcakes will keep in an airtight container in the freezer for up to 6 weeks. For easier preparation, make the ice cream balls ahead of time by scooping out balls of ice cream, placing them on a baking sheet or in a bowl, and returning them to the freezer to firm.
